items.title: Pack the BougeRV 2026 telescopic camping light for your outdoor adventures while down at $75 low right now
items.summary:
Update: Amazon has dropped the price on this camping light back to the $75 low during a limited-time Lightning sale.

BougeRV 2026 Telescopic Camping Light

Buy for $81 (Reg. $100)

What we love

Got plenty of outdoor adventures planned for the rest of summer? Well, this handy BougeRV camping light is a versatile device that you should definitely consider adding to your kit, as its 15,600mAh battery allows for up to 102 hours of lighting on each full charge. Not only that, but it goes from a 2.4-pound compact and portable size and extends up to 5.5 feet tall, complete with adjustable lights and three modes (daylight, amber, red).

If you don’t mind dropping down to 15W charging speeds, you can also save a bit more with the ICEMAG 2 model at $52.90 shipped, down from $70, or there are additional Sharge deals in the official Amazon storefront here.

items.title: Still live: Anker’s latest 45W Nano charger with smart display is down to just $26 today (All colors)
items.summary: A bunch of Anker chargers are back to their Prime Day prices today, and one of the more notable deals worth considering right now gets you the brand’s latest 45W Nano Smart Display charger for $25.99 with free shipping for Prime members or in orders over $35. This popular GaN charger typically sells for $40, and while we have seen a handful of discounts in the past, today’s offer takes $14 off to bring it back down to the Amazon low it hit during the recent Prime Day. That’s 35% off its usual going rate and matches the best single-unit price we have tracked so far, outside of a short-lived two-pack offer that effectively brought each charger down to $25 directly at Anker. The orange, blue, black, and white finishes are all included in the deal, so you can choose the one that best fits your everyday setup.

items.title: Release schedule for the best 2026 Switch 2 games: Zelda, James Bond, Batman, Kingdom Hearts, more

There is a long list of titles already locked down for 2026, from James Bond and brick-built Batman to the new Switch Sports Resort game, the Kingdom Hearts collection, and more. Let’s dive in.

items.title: Tested: Hands-on with the new Baseus PicoGo Air – Wildly thin MagSafe power bank for iPhone at just 0.27 inches [Deal]
items.summary: A lot of brands have launched slim power banks recently, but Baseus may have just unleashed one of the thinnest MagSafe power banks yet for iPhones at just 0.27 inches. I was pleasantly surprised to see just how thin the PicoGo Air is in real life, and it still packs a 5,000mAh battery, unlike some competing models that top out at 3,000mAh. It can also deliver up to 22.5W over USB-C, which is great. Baseus’ official Amazon storefront is offering it for $39.99 shipped right now with promo code EHYGXRMR as part of a launch deal – 42% off the usual $70 price. Head below for some of my hands-on thoughts.

items.title: Nvidia’s biggest RAM supplier just had a trillion-dollar debut on Wall Street
items.summary: As the AI boom boosts demand for RAM, SK Hynix - one of the world's biggest suppliers of memory chips - launched on Wall Street Friday. The South Korean chipmaker opened at $170 per share and raised $26.5 billion, surpassing Alibaba's record as the largest debut of a foreign company, according to reports from The […]

items.title: Malaysia EV registrations nearly double in June 2026, Proton e.MAS 5 leads again
items.summary: Malaysia’s electric vehicle (EV) market continue to show strong momentum in June 2026, with 6,215 units registered according to the latest JPJ data. That’s an increase of 89.9% compared to 3,272 EVs registered in June 2025. EVs accounted for 8.52% of Malaysia’s 72,943 total vehicle registrations in June, making it the second-highest monthly EV market […]

items.title: SK Hynix raises $26.5B in the biggest foreign IPO in US history, is urged to build new US fabs
items.summary: The AI chip boom just produced its biggest Wall Street moment yet. Now SK Hynix and Samsung are being asked to build U.S. factories.

items.title: Friday Android app deals and freebies: ScourgeBringer, Greak, Egg Journey, more
items.summary: Your afternoon lineup of the best Android game and app deals is now here, including titles like ScourgeBringer, Greak: Memories of Azur, Tower Defense Legend 5 Pro, Escape Alive, Egg Journey, FrogBoy, and more. Just be sure to check out Samsung’s latest Galaxy Buds 4 Pro at up to $112 off, Anker’s 3-port 160W Smart Display charger back at Prime Day pricing, and this rare deal on Logitech’s latest haptics-enabled MX Master 4 before it’s gone. The Friday Android app deals await below.

items.title: A new app, HyperTexting, turns the open web into a scrollable social media-like feed
items.summary: HyperTexting's new app aims to make the open web feel more like social media by turning websites, blogs, newsletters, and podcasts into a scrollable feed, while also making it easier to post to your own website.

items.title: Step up to on-the-go charging with exclusive savings on Bluetti’s 560W Charger 1 or 1,200W dual Charger 2 starting from $208
items.summary: As part of Bluetti’s ongoing Summer Power Sale deals, folks with existing power stations who want to utilize on-the-go charging can find the Bluetti 560W Alternator Charger 1 for $208.05 shipped, after using our exclusive code 9TO5TOYS5OFF at checkout for extra savings, beating out Amazon by $11. While it originally carried a $299 MSRP, the brand permanently cut that rate down to $249 back in May, while discounts before and after have consistently lowered the costs down to $219 in 2026. Our exclusive bonus savings code gives you a far better deal with $41 combined savings off the new going rate (and $91 off the old MSRP) for the second-lowest price we have tracked this year – just $9 above the 2026 low we saw during last month’s Prime Day event. There’s also the newer 1200W Alternator & Solar Dual DC Charger down at $426.55 shipped, using the same code, which beats Amazon by $22.

items.title: Nintendo x LEGO Donkey Kong Arcade set leaks online: First look image, details, and price
items.summary: Back in late May Nintendo and LEGO official teased upcoming Donkey Kong sets. At the time it was unclear whether or not this would be some sort of expansion to the existing Super Mario theme or not, but since then it has started to become clear DK is getting his own sets entirely and the first image of the new LEGO Donkey Kong Arcade has leaked online.

items.title: Disney+ is considering a free streaming tier, report says
items.summary: The launch of free content would allow Disney+ to better compete with free services like YouTube and Tubi, which are capturing a growing share of consumers’ viewing time.

items.title: Enjoy ambiance or DIY patterns through Govee’s Wall Lights Pro with Matter while the 2-pack is down at $200
items.summary: Through its official Amazon storefront, Govee is offering the new Outdoor Wall Lights Pro with Matter 2-Pack at $199.99 shipped, after clipping the on-page 20% off coupon, matching the price we’re seeing direct from Govee’s website. Only on the market since mid-May with a $250 full price tag, we’ve only seen two previous discounts for this 2-pack – one dropping prices to $200 and another to $185 during last month’s Prime Day event. If you missed your chance then, you’re still getting a solid $50 savings here for the next-best price. There’s more of the brand’s smart lighting deals in the official Amazon storefront here, as well as outdoor devices on the direct website here.

items.title: This 120W car charger with dual 60W Type-C and two USB-A ports just struck $17 (Reg. $30)
items.summary:
JOYROOM 120W Dual USB-A/Type-C Car Charger

Buy for $17 (Reg. $30)

What we love

Outfitted with two USB-A and two Type-C ports, there are enough outputs here to keep a family of four topped off while on the go. It can dish out a total of 120W, with both USB-C slots able to independently reach 60W.

items.title: Fanttik’s slim V8 APEX vacuum with USB-C charging keeps your vehicle, office, and more tidy for $66 (Reg. $100)
items.summary:
Fanttik Slim V8 APEX Car Vacuum

Buy for $66 (Reg. $100)

What we love

I personally find that the easier I make it to keep things clean, the more often I will actually do it. That’s why I recommend keeping a vacuum like this in your vehicle, office, or well, really anywhere that can get dirty and often overlooked. In typical Fanttik fashion, it charges via USB-C to make things feel handy and modern.

items.title: Redditor Exposes Fake 16TB SSD Scam After Finding Weights And A microSD Card Inside
items.summary:
One Reddit user recently shared their discovery of a fake 16TB SSD purchased from eBay for under $30 (~RM122). Instead of a high-capacity drive, the enclosure only contained a small board, a microSD card, and some weights hot-glued inside to mimic the feel of a legitimate SSD. u/Hartkralle explained that they regularly purchase suspicious storage […]
